name: Celery-Celery-Celery Bread
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 tsp Celery, garlic or Onion salt
recipeInstructions:
1. Add all the ingredients to a bowl.
2. Select white bread and push "Start."
3. Incorporating multiple forms of celery for flavor and food value creates an enticing bread to slice for sandwiches or as a meal accompaniment.
